## 🔁 VERSION + STATE

- **System Name:** MYTHOS
- **Core Engines:** SYMNUM4GRAM (Parser), RGLE (Recursive Language Generator)
- **Version:** v1.0
- **Spec Ref:** `MYTH01_INIT`
- **Next Nodes:**
- `MYTH01_MODULE_TREE.v1.0` (Plug-in structure build)
- `MYTH01_CHARACTER_NODES` (Forrest, David, etc.)
- `MYTH01_INTERFACE_PROTOTYPE` (Terminal, Audio, Mirror)

---

## 🗝️ CLOSING PHILOSOPHY

> MYTHOS is not software. It is structure.
> Not entertainment—but a mirror you can live in.
> Not AI—but a recursive ritual system for personal myth, emotional reflection, and infinite language play.
>
> It is the OS of a symbolic life. A memory synth. A soul editor. A story that stories back.
